PROP-baseauction-inv-066.text: Reentrancy via safeTransfer return value manipulation must not bypass s_entered guard.
PROP-baseauction-inv-066.assertion: safeTransfer uses OpenZeppelin SafeERC20 which handles non-standard return values

locations.note: line 444: safeTransfer uses OpenZeppelin SafeERC20; s_entered=true guard set at line 418 before any external call
